headline: Is W.W. Grainger, Inc. (GWW) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is GWW a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on W.W. Grainger, Inc. on MaxDividends’s Substack by Serhio MaxDividends. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on GWW. W.W. Grainger, Inc.’s share was trading at $1,342.57 as of June 24th. GWW’s trailing and forward P/E were 36.10 and 30.03 respectively according […]
